channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Talarico desperately tries to clean up his 'cringey comments,' but only makes things worse
Kari Lake tells Newsmax: Media panics over Trump's health
item.description: Kari Lake accused mainstream media on Newsmax Wednesday of focusing on President Donald Trump's health while ignoring what she called obvious...

item.title: Massachusetts town with key Revolutionary role cancels July 4 event
item.description: A central Massachusetts town that played a crucial role in the nation's founding has canceled its annual Fourth of July celebration during America's 2...

item.title: RFK Jr. responds to snake-handling critics with video showing him wrangling a venomous rattlesnake
item.description: RFK Jr. responded to social media concerns by sharing a video showing how he and wife Cheryl Hines carefully handled a venomous rattlesnake rescue.
